category_sources: source_facts.description says buildkitd is the daemon package for the BuildKit builder toolkit.
source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official moby/buildkit repository.
docs_sources: Official repository docs include buildkitd.toml daemon configuration documentation and the README.
source_facts.repo points to the official moby/buildkit repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/moby/buildkit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the BuildKit daemon package.
